title: Detect and fix 3 anti-patterns in fixture
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/multi_antipattern_liveview.ex has multiple anti-patterns. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/projects_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProjectsLive) that explicitly fixes THREE of them: (1) DB query in mount → handle_params, (2) unguarded PubSub subscribe → connected? guard, (3) unscoped topic "projects" → "projects:org:#{current_user.org_id}". The other anti-patterns in the fixture (stream conversion, authz) may be left alone for this challenge.
tier_rationale: Requires identifying and fixing 3 distinct anti-patterns in a noisy fixture.
